failedAssertions.reason: Invalid-password login still rotates/sets a session cookie despite 401 response; contract expects no session cookie on failed auth.
Non-existent-user login still rotates/sets a session cookie despite generic 401 error; contract expects no session cookie on failed auth.
Unknown non-API routes render a friendly 404 UI but return HTTP 200 SPA shell instead of HTTP 404.
Flash lifecycle works (appears and clears), but success flash styling is neutral rather than expected green success styling.

appliedUpdates.description: Added guidance that Sonner toasts are brief and style-sensitive checks should capture immediate evidence plus computed styles.
